meta-description: Learn aboout out-of-pocket estimates by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Out-of-pocket estimate
excerpt: An estimate of the amount that you may have to pay on your own for health care or prescription drug costs. The estimate is made before your health plan has processed a claim for that service.
content: An estimate of the amount that you may have to pay on your own for health care or prescription drug costs. The estimate is made before your health plan has processed a claim for that service.
